gt_sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.department = 'School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education'
pred_sql: SELECT member.first_name, member.last_name FROM member JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id WHERE major.department = 'School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education';
question: List all the members of the "School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education" department.
